title: Full-Stack Engineer, Compliance Automation
summary: Built and delivered a production compliance automation platform combining a high-performance Next.js SPA, backend workflows, ETLs, and reporting systems.
highlights: Implemented a high-performance SPA in Next.js and TypeScript with TanStack-based data fetching and state management.
Architected backend workflows, ETLs, and database design for reporting and control use cases.
Delivered a production system used by thousands of NBCUniversal employees and reduced manual work by up to 80%.
manual_highlights: Built a complex User Access Review compliance system on the Power Platform for NBCUniversal.
Built a React.js and Next.js application that is in production and used by hundreds of NBCUniversal employees.
Created dozens of Power Automate flows and dataflows to support compliance workflows and data movement.
Designed and implemented tens of Dataverse tables to support the application's data model.
Built both model-driven and canvas Power Apps for different operational and compliance use cases.
Implemented AI bots integrated with Microsoft Teams.
Developed a React application embedded inside a model-driven Power Apps application.
Implemented GitHub Actions to support engineering workflow automation and delivery.
Worked with Microsoft Entra ID for identity and access management integration.
Used Codex to accelerate software development and support project management work.

manual_notes.note: Built a complex User Access Review compliance system using Power Platform, including dozens of flows and dataflows, tens of Dataverse tables, model-driven and canvas apps, AI bots connected to Microsoft Teams, and an embedded React application inside a model-driven app.
Also worked with Jira and GitHub at NBCUniversal, implemented GitHub Actions, and worked with Microsoft Entra ID.
Used Codex at NBCUniversal to support software development and project management.
Built a React.js/Next.js application at NBCUniversal that is in production and used by hundreds of employees.

source.notes: Parsed from JOSE BANDE SERRANO RESUME V6.pdf
